findings.issue: Resolution label 1280x960 mapped to 'QVGA' is factually incorrect. QVGA = 320x240 (Quarter VGA). 1280x960 has no standard VESA acronym. This error is propagated identically across JP/ZH/EN — it is a source-content error faithfully translated.
findings.action_required: Fix source data: either correct the resolution value to 320x240, or remove/blank the QVGA label for 1280x960 row

findings.issue: Duplicate section_number '11-04' assigned to two different section titles: p403='半導体メモリ' (Semiconductor Memory) and p405='記憶' (Memory). Different titles under same number indicates a metadata extraction error. (11-05 is also duplicated but with the same title '入力と出力' on p407 and p409, which is expected for a multi-page section.)
findings.action_required: Verify source structure: confirm correct section numbers for p403 and p405

findings.issue: Asymmetric abbreviation expansion for FHD: JP='FHD' (no expansion), ZH='全高清（FHD）' (has expansion), EN='FHD (Full HD)' (has expansion). JP should add '（Full HD）' for trilingual consistency.
findings.action_required: Add '（Full HD）' to JP value, or accept as intentional JP source brevity

findings.issue: Asymmetric abbreviation expansion for USB surface: JP='USB' (no expansion), ZH='通用串行总线（USB）' (has expansion), EN='USB (Universal Serial Bus)' (has expansion). Glossary JP entry is 'USB（Universal Serial Bus）' confirming expansion exists.
findings.action_required: Add '（Universal Serial Bus）' to JP surface, consistent with glossary and ZH/EN

findings.issue: ZH internal register inconsistency: same JP phrase '電気を使って...半導体メモリ' rendered as '利用电...' in table rows but '利用电流...' in corresponding term definition entities on the same page. '利用电流' (using electric current) is more technically precise.
findings.table_zh_sample: 利用电在半导体存储器上读写数据的装置
findings.term_zh_sample: 利用电流读写半导体存储器中数据的装置
findings.action_required: Harmonize to '利用电流' in table rows for consistency with term definitions

summary: Chunk 39 (pages 402-411) covers removable storage, semiconductor memory (RAM/ROM/DRAM/SRAM/Flash), input/output devices (keyboard, mouse, touch panel, scanner, printers), display technology, and I/O interfaces. 159 atomic leaves checked across 55 entities (38 terms, 4 tables, 8 figures, 5 sections). Completeness: PASS — all leaves fully populated in jp/zh/en. Semantic consistency: PASS — 32 flagged pairs resolved as true false-positives (language-neutral abbreviations and numeric values). 1 HIGH finding: QVGA label factually incorrect for resolution 1280x960 (source-content error propagated across all 3 languages). 1 MEDIUM finding: duplicate section_number 11-04 on two different section titles (p403 vs p405). 3 LOW findings: asymmetric abbreviation expansion (FHD on p410, USB on p411) and ZH internal register inconsistency (利用电 vs 利用电流 on p402). Overall trilingual translation quality is HIGH — definitions are accurate, register is appropriate, and technical terminology is correct throughout.
